name: GitHub PR Inline Comment Handling
query: How do I reply to inline comments on PR #30 in Sense/cursor-starter-kit and resolve the threads?
expected_behavior: Step 1: Provides GraphQL query to get review thread IDs
Step 1a: Shows query with repository owner, name, and PR number
Step 1b: Explains how to extract thread IDs from response
success_criteria: Provides complete GraphQL query for getting threads
Shows mutation for replying to threads (not just comments)
Includes thread ID extraction with jq
Shows complete working example with real repo/PR
